channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed

item.title: RAYE opened the Montreux Jazz Festival tonight with surprise…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: RAYE opened the Montreux Jazz Festival tonight with surprise guests Alicia Keys and Mark Ronson. Her set honored the event’s 60th year with nods to classics recorded by Nina Simone, Ray Charles, Prince, and more.
item.content:encoded: RAYE opened the Montreux Jazz Festival tonight with surprise guests Alicia Keys and Mark Ronson. Her set honored the event’s 60th year with nods to classics recorded by Nina Simone, Ray Charles, Prince, and more.

item.title: Prog never stands still. This month's Prog Is a State of Min…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Prog never stands still. This month's Prog Is a State of Mind celebrates the legacy of Dave Greenslade, spotlights adventurous new releases, and proves there's always another corner of prog to explore.
item.content:encoded: Prog never stands still. This month's Prog Is a State of Mind celebrates the legacy of Dave Greenslade, spotlights adventurous new releases, and proves there's always another corner of prog to explore.

item.title: The Gansett Games closing ceremony had Michael Stipe and Bra…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: The Gansett Games closing ceremony had Michael Stipe and Brandi Carlile covering Elvis Presley, Josh Homme shredding on a Tom Petty song, and more
item.content:encoded: The Gansett Games closing ceremony had Michael Stipe and Brandi Carlile covering Elvis Presley, Josh Homme shredding on a Tom Petty song, and more

item.title: Taylor Swift’s massive wedding to Travis Kelce is the hottes…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Taylor Swift’s massive wedding to Travis Kelce is the hottest event of the summer — and we finally know the lucky ones who were invited to attend the bash at Madison Square Garden on July 3.

Read ↓
item.content:encoded:
Taylor Swift’s massive wedding to Travis Kelce is the hottest event of the summer — and we finally know the lucky ones who were invited to attend the bash at Madison Square Garden on July 3.

Read ↓

item.title: From Santa Fe to Akron, these five cassette labels prove tha…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: From Santa Fe to Akron, these five cassette labels prove that some of the most adventurous music still comes wrapped in plastic. Discover your next favorite tape.
item.content:encoded: From Santa Fe to Akron, these five cassette labels prove that some of the most adventurous music still comes wrapped in plastic. Discover your next favorite tape.

item.content:encoded: Touch & Go co-founder Dave Stimson has died

item.title: Superfans and sleuths appear to have their hunches confirmed…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Superfans and sleuths appear to have their hunches confirmed on Friday, as dozens of black cars dropped off elegantly dressed guests outside of Madison Square Garden in New York City. The wedding bash is expected to last into Saturday morning. n.pr/4f5J9aO
item.content:encoded: Superfans and sleuths appear to have their hunches confirmed on Friday, as dozens of black cars dropped off elegantly dressed guests outside of Madison Square Garden in New York City. The wedding bash is expected to last into Saturday morning. n.pr/4f5J9aO

item.title: The country's theocracy hopes to see millions flood the stre…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The country's theocracy hopes to see millions flood the streets of the capital beginning Saturday in scenes reminiscent to the burial of the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini in 1989. n.pr/4batbL9
item.content:encoded: The country's theocracy hopes to see millions flood the streets of the capital beginning Saturday in scenes reminiscent to the burial of the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini in 1989. n.pr/4batbL9

item.title: In Venezuela, international emergency crews — including a te…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In Venezuela, international emergency crews — including a team from LA — are working tirelessly to reach people still missing after last week's devastating earthquakes. n.pr/4p1iMqI
item.content:encoded: In Venezuela, international emergency crews — including a team from LA — are working tirelessly to reach people still missing after last week's devastating earthquakes. n.pr/4p1iMqI

item.title: Nearly half of the Americans surveyed in a new national poll…

item.title: Prince William popped by Travis and Jason Kelce's podcast 'N…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Prince William popped by Travis and Jason Kelce's podcast 'New Heights,' with the episode arriving only hours before the Kansas City Chiefs player’s big wedding to Taylor Swift.

Watch ↓
item.content:encoded:
Prince William popped by Travis and Jason Kelce's podcast 'New Heights,' with the episode arriving only hours before the Kansas City Chiefs player’s big wedding to Taylor Swift.

item.title: The costs of having a baby in the U.S. can be hard to predic…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The costs of having a baby in the U.S. can be hard to predict and budget for. We want to hear your stories and questions about how to navigate the system. n.pr/3SEOXAp
item.content:encoded: The costs of having a baby in the U.S. can be hard to predict and budget for. We want to hear your stories and questions about how to navigate the system. n.pr/3SEOXAp

item.title: July 4th events for America's milestone birthday are being t…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: July 4th events for America's milestone birthday are being threatened by a brutal heat wave. And, Russia has struck Ukraine's capital, killing several people in what it calls retaliatory attacks. n.pr/4y31wFQ
item.content:encoded: July 4th events for America's milestone birthday are being threatened by a brutal heat wave. And, Russia has struck Ukraine's capital, killing several people in what it calls retaliatory attacks. n.pr/4y31wFQ

item.title: How Bam Margera, ‘The Britney Spears of Jackass,’ Is Getting…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
How Bam Margera, ‘The Britney Spears of Jackass,’ Is Getting Back on Top

Since getting fired from 'Jackass Forever' in 2020, Bam Margera has found sobriety and love — with a little help from psychedelics and skateboarding.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...
item.content:encoded:
How Bam Margera, ‘The Britney Spears of Jackass,’ Is Getting Back on Top

Since getting fired from 'Jackass Forever' in 2020, Bam Margera has found sobriety and love — with a little help from psychedelics and skateboarding.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/culture/cult...

item.title: JC Necrohex, mastermind of Mexican speed metal maniacs Phant…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: JC Necrohex, mastermind of Mexican speed metal maniacs Phantom, joins the show to talk about the band's rapid rise. Listen to The Metal Show on Bandcamp Radio.
item.content:encoded: JC Necrohex, mastermind of Mexican speed metal maniacs Phantom, joins the show to talk about the band's rapid rise. Listen to The Metal Show on Bandcamp Radio.
